platformHeading: A private club layer for verified access, partner discovery and Business Introduction control.
platformCopy: Digital cards, moderated partner records and protected member flows stay organized in one dark, premium workspace.
platformSignal1: Card verification exposes only the approved public status fields.
platformSignal2: Member actions stay behind authenticated and role-aware account flows.
platformSignal3: Partner visibility is governed by moderated public directory records.
securityCopy: Public data is shaped through typed DTOs, private activity remains authenticated, and legal disclaimers stay visible on every public page.
legalLine1: KYLYVNYK CLUB is an independent private membership platform.
legalLine2: KYLYVNYK CLUB is not an employer, financing service, chain-sales company or compensation promise.
legalLine3: Special conditions are provided directly by independent third-party partners.
legalLine4: KYLYVNYK CLUB does not promise price reductions, compensation, clients or business results.
legalLine5: Partners independently provide their own services and are responsible for their own licenses, permits and compliance.
legalLine6: KYLYVNYK CLUB does not participate in transactions, negotiations or agreements between users and partners.
